'''thafara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placentophagy|placentophagy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placentophagy|placentophagy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thafara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæfæræth|thæfæræth]] || [[word:thæfæræj|thæfæræj]] || [[word:thæfæræsh|thæfæræsh]] || [[word:thæfæræ|thæfæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thafafarath|thafafarath]] || [[word:thafafaraj|thafafaraj]] || [[word:thafafarash|thafafarash]] || [[word:thafafara|thafafara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafarath|thafarath]] || [[word:thafaraj|thafaraj]] || [[word:thafarash|thafarash]] || [[word:thafara|thafara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafafrafth|thafafrafth]] || [[word:thafafrafj|thafafrafj]] || [[word:thafafrafsh|thafafrafsh]] || [[word:thafafraf|thafafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thafaratha|thafaratha]] || [[word:thafaraja|thafaraja]] || [[word:thafarasha|thafarasha]] || [[word:thafaraka|thafaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thafarath|thafarath]] || [[word:thafaraj|thafaraj]] || [[word:thafarash|thafarash]] || [[word:thafara|thafara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thafarathal|thafarathal]] || [[word:thafarajal|thafarajal]] || [[word:thafarashal|thafarashal]] || [[word:thafarakal|thafarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thafaraathatha|thafaraathatha]] || [[word:thafaraajaja|thafaraajaja]] || [[word:thafaraashasha|thafaraashasha]] || [[word:thafaraaka|thafaraaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thafarathan|thafarathan]] || [[word:thafarajan|thafarajan]] || [[word:thafarashan|thafarashan]] || [[word:thafarakan|thafarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thafarathaoro|thafarathaoro]] || [[word:thafarajaoro|thafarajaoro]] || [[word:thafarashaoro|thafarashaoro]] || [[word:thafarakaoro|thafarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
